title: diuris emarginata var. pauciflora
intro: Diuris emarginata var. pauciflora, also known as the lesser donkey orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family native to Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Diuris emarginata var. pauciflora include its potential to relieve bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antimicrobial properties that help combat infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Diuris emarginata var. pauciflora is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in some commercial herbal products to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
